How It Works

SIMPLE.
PROVEN.

StokfelPro uses a 3× matrix — you have 3 direct slots. Fill them and the system fills your deeper levels automatically through spillover.

01

Join for R200

Pay R50 platform fee to admin + R150 to your upline. Upload two proofs. Account activates when both are confirmed.

02

Recruit 3 Members

Share your referral link. When 3 people join under you, each pays you R150 directly to your bank account.

+R450
03

Upgrade & Scale

Upgrade to Level 2 for R400 — fully funded by your R450 earnings. You keep R50 profit and now earn from 9 members.

+R3,150
04

Reach the Top

At Level 4 you earn from 81 members each paying R2,500 directly to your bank. Maximum cycle payout.

+R202,500
♻

Recycle & Repeat

After Level 4 you receive 2 free re-entry positions at Level 1. The cycle continues with zero extra cost.

FAQ

QUESTIONS
ANSWERED.

Is this legal in South Africa? +
StokfelPro operates as a peer-to-peer stokvel community. All payments are directly between members — transparent and fully member-to-member.
How does the R200 break down? +
R50 goes to admin as a platform usage fee. R150 goes directly to your assigned upline member. You upload two separate proofs of EFT payment.
Do I need to recruit to earn? +
You need 3 recruits to complete Level 1. The spillover system can fill slots automatically. Active recruiting speeds up earnings significantly.
Are upgrades out-of-pocket? +
Never. Every upgrade is funded from your current level earnings. Level 1 earns R450, upgrade costs R400 — you keep R50 profit. Zero extra spend.
What happens after Level 4? +
You automatically receive 2 free re-entry positions at Level 1 — the anti-collapse mechanism ensures the cycle continues at no cost to you.
How do I receive payments? +
All payments are EFT directly to your bank account. Members below you pay you directly. You approve their proof of payment in the app.
Ready?
